courses.name: Data Communication & Computer Networks
courses.description: Fundamental concepts in network topologies, layer architectures, routing protocols, and client-server network socket programming.

courses.name: Information Systems Security & Cryptography
courses.description: Introduction to authentication, symmetric/asymmetric algorithms, AES encryption, RSA, hashing functions, and cloud security frameworks.

materials.title: SEC 401 - Course Syllabus & Grading Matrix
materials.description: Comprehensive semester schedule list, outline of assignments, textbooks, and final exam details.

materials.title: Lecture Slide 1: Introduction to AES & DES Cryptography
materials.description: Fundamentals of symmetric key cryptosystems, bit distribution permutations, and secure key exchanges.

materials.title: Assignment 1: TCP Congestion Control and Socket Programming Protocol
materials.description: Develop a multi-threaded socket program detailing sliding window flow control. Due on 2026-06-25.

submissions.feedback: Outstanding implementation of TCP congestion control logic. Multi-threading is robust and well commented. Keep it up!

notes.title: Exam Prep on Cipher Block Chaining (CBC)
notes.content: Make sure to remember: 1. Initialization Vector (IV) must be completely random. 2. Plaintext is XORed with previous ciphertext block. 3. Identical plaintext blocks will result in entirely different ciphertext blocks.
